# Step 07: Migrate Cloud Provider — AWS → Azure
# Generated by GH Copilot CLI - Spec2Cloud Methodology

## Changes Made

### POM Dependencies
- Removed: software.amazon.awssdk:s3 (v2.25.13)
- Removed: spring-boot-starter-amqp (RabbitMQ)
- Added: com.azure:azure-storage-blob (v12.29.1)
- Added: com.azure:azure-messaging-servicebus (v7.17.8)
- Added: com.fasterxml.jackson.core:jackson-databind (for JSON serialization)

### Storage Migration: AWS S3 → Azure Blob Storage
- web/config/AwsS3Config.java: S3Client → BlobServiceClient + BlobContainerClient beans
- worker/config/AwsS3Config.java: Same transformation
- web/service/AwsS3Service.java: S3 operations → Azure Blob operations
  - ListObjectsV2 → listBlobs()
  - PutObject → upload() + setHttpHeaders()
  - GetObject → openInputStream()
  - DeleteObject → deleteIfExists()
- worker/service/S3FileProcessingService.java: S3 → Azure Blob
  - getObject → downloadStream()
  - putObject → uploadFromFile()

### Messaging Migration: RabbitMQ → Azure Service Bus
- web/config/RabbitConfig.java: Queue/Converter/Factory → ServiceBusSenderClient
- worker/config/RabbitConfig.java: Queue/Converter/Factory → ServiceBusProcessorClient
- web/service/AwsS3Service.java: RabbitTemplate.convertAndSend → ServiceBusSenderClient.sendMessage
- web/service/LocalFileStorageService.java: Same messaging migration
- worker/service/AbstractFileProcessingService.java: @RabbitListener → processMessage/processError callbacks
- web/service/BackupMessageProcessor.java: @RabbitListener → Service Bus context

### Application Entry Points
- AssetsManagerApplication.java: Removed @EnableRabbit
- WorkerApplication.java: Removed @EnableRabbit

### Configuration Properties
- web/application.properties: aws.* → azure.storage.* + azure.servicebus.*
- worker/application.properties: aws.* → azure.storage.* + azure.servicebus.*
- Removed: spring.rabbitmq.* properties
- Added: azure.storage.connection-string, azure.storage.container-name
- Added: azure.servicebus.connection-string

### Storage Type
- Changed storage type from "s3" to "azure" in service implementations

### Build Verification
- Maven clean compile: SUCCESS with Azure SDK dependencies
